chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Mahziyar

text: و ما كان فيه عن إبراهيم بن مهزيار فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحميريّ، عن إبراهيم بن مهزيار.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Himyari, from Ibrahim ibn Mahziyar.
